-- pgvector ANN: L2 ORDER BY column <-> query_vector LIMIT k
SELECT p_partkey FROM part
WHERE text_embedding IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY text_embedding <-> (SELECT text_embedding FROM part WHERE text_embedding IS NOT NULL ORDER BY p_partkey OFFSET 1297 LIMIT 1)
LIMIT 40;
